quote: There is nothing wrong with letting people who love you help you.
Keeping a level head is a sign of a great leader.
There is nothing wrong with letting people who love you help you.
It is important to draw wisdom from many different places. If you take it from only one place, it becomes rigid and stale. Understanding others... will help you become whole.
While it is great to believe in one self, a little help from others can be a great blessing.
Sometimes life is like this dark tunnel. You can't see the light at the end, but if you just keep moving, you will come to a better place.
Power and perfection are overrated. I think you are wise to choose happiness and love.
Sometimes the best way to solve your own problems is to help someone else.
Eugh! This tea is nothing more than hot leaf-juice!
Protection and power are overrated. I think you are very wise to choose happiness and love. There are reasons each of us are born. we have to find those reasons.
Follow your passion (Zuko), and life will reward you.
Pride is not the opposite of shame, but it's source. True humility is the only antidote to shame.
I believe people can change their mind if they want to. I believe in second chances.
Life happens wherever you are, whether you make it or not.
It's time for you to look inward and begin asking yourself the big questions: who are you, and what do you want?
Harsh words can't solve problems; action will.
The monks used to say that revenge is like a two-headed rat viper. While you watch your enemy go down, you're being poisoned yourself.

The true mind can weather all the lies and illusions without being lost. The true heart can tough the poison of hatred without being harmed. Since beginning-less time, darkness thrives in the void, but always yields to purifying light.
It's easy to do nothing, but it's hard to forgive.
The strength of your heart makes you who you are.
There's always a right way to do things.
Love is brightest in the dark.
Pants are an illusion and so is death.
Instead of seeing what they want you to see, you got to open your brain to the possibilities.
I didn't know what or when, but I knew I'd know it when I knew it!
Lettuce leave?
You Must look within yourself to find yourself, only then will your true self reveal itself.
Destiny is a funny thing. You never know how things are going to work out, but if you keep an open mind and an open heart, I promise you will find your own destiny someday.
Being on your own isn't always your best path.
You're going to fail a lot before things work out.
